Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Premium Siding Llc to get the job done right.

“Premium Siding did an outstanding job installing new vinyl siding on our home in Clintonville. The crew was professional, efficient, and paid close attention to detail. Our house looks fantastic, and we've already received compliments from our neighbors. I highly recommend them!”

Sarah M. Vinyl Siding Installation
Mar 15, 2025

“We had some storm damage to our fiber cement siding in German Village, and Premium Siding responded quickly and provided a fair quote. The repair was done seamlessly, and you can't even tell there was any damage. Very satisfied with their service.”

John K. Siding Repair
Nov 20, 2024

“We chose Premium Siding to install cedar siding on our Tudor home in Upper Arlington. The craftsmanship was exceptional. They took the time to ensure every piece was perfectly fitted and stained. A truly professional job!”

Emily R. Wood Siding Installation
Jan 5, 2025

“Premium Siding fixed our damaged soffit and fascia after squirrels got into our attic. They were prompt, courteous, and did a great job sealing everything up. We haven't had any problems since. Highly recommend!”

David L. Soffit and Fascia Repair
Sep 12, 2024

“Our old vinyl siding was falling apart, so we hired Premium Siding for a complete replacement. The new siding looks amazing, and our house feels much more insulated. The only reason for 4 stars is there was a slight delay in the project start date, but the work itself was excellent.”

Jessica P. Siding Replacement
Feb 28, 2025

“We recently had Premium Siding install fiber cement siding. From the initial consultation to the final walk-through, their team was professional, knowledgeable, and attentive to our needs. The new siding has transformed the look of our home, and we feel confident it will last for many years to come.”

Michael S. Fiber Cement Siding
Oct 1, 2024
Premium Siding Llc

Trusted siding contractor professionals serving Columbus, OH and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
